message:
fix(core): make 65536→0 page-size encoding explicit in init_leaf_table_page

The `as u16` cast silently truncated 65536 to 0, which happened to be
correct per SQLite's encoding convention but was accidental and fragile.
Replace with an explicit branch that documents the convention and returns
an error for any truly invalid page size.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
